inputs.label: Scalp Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: The surface area of the scalp in square centimeters. Typical adult scalp area ranges from 600 to 800 cm².

businessContext_i18n.en: The surface area of the scalp in square centimeters. Typical adult scalp area ranges from 600 to 800 cm².
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santimetrekare cinsinden saç derisi yüzey alanı. Tipik yetişkin saç derisi alanı 600-800 cm² arasındadır.

inputs.label: Hair Density
inputs.businessContext: Average number of hair strands per square centimeter. Typical range is 100-300 strands/cm².

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of hair strands per square centimeter. Typical range is 100-300 strands/cm².
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santimetrekare başına ortalama saç teli sayısı. Tipik aralık 100-300 tel/cm²'dir.

inputs.label: Average Hair Length
inputs.businessContext: The average length of hair strands from root to tip in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average length of hair strands from root to tip in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saç tellerinin kökten uca ortalama uzunluğu (cm cinsinden).

inputs.label: Daily Hair Loss
inputs.businessContext: Typical number of hair strands lost per day, normally between 50 and 100.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical number of hair strands lost per day, normally between 50 and 100.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günde kaybedilen tipik saç teli sayısı, normalde 50-100 arası.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
